title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Pilgrim - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Pilgrim! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Pilgrim:
Pilgrim is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim!
